TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakiliman == malemeday ci Lu-ke ŚĻłťĀčÁöĄŤ∑ĮŚÖč "malemeday ci Lu-ke" "kamu nu Ba, Lucky Luke" u cacay makayzaay i Pid-li-s a mangga saayaway anisanga'an ni qMu-li-s, angangan atu Ba-kow sinmunga a mangga ci Le-nye¬∑Ke-vu-ni pulung a nisanga'an tu nu manggaay. u sasulitan makayzaay i satipan nu Ameylika u pahutinay hinadihiay mipadangay tu mapadesay a tademaw. Uyni a mangga u cacayay i Aw-cow atu Pye-mey-cow matineng namin ku paylumaluma'an tu singanganay a manggaan, u mapalaway ku acawa, katukuh ayza caay kalasawad ku ngangan. Taywan kapulungan a tilibi micakay tu malemeday ci Lu-ke a iga nu misaungayay a mangga "bung-ce-si-cen-ci' ku sitatungusay, tahkal i tilibi. tusa ku kamu. DVD u Hung-en lalangawan tayli patahkalay, misulup tu nu hulamay a kamu , Ba a kamu atu cung-ing hekalay a cudad. makay 1946 a mihcaan, Pi-li-s nu misulitay tu mangga ci Mu-li-s "Morris" saayaway a nisanga'an nu malemeday ci Lu-ke" malingatu ku mahiniay a waway, katukuh 2001 a mihcaan kapatayan a pahezek, nisulitan niza tu mahiniay nacaay henay kaketun. u saayaway niza ku malemeday ci Lu-ke nganngan nu kunghku "1880 a mihcaan Ya-li-san-na-cow "Arizona 1880" i 1946 a mihca 12 a bulad 7 a demiad, saayaway pabinawlan musakamu i Bakow-Pi-li-s mangga zasi "S-pi-lu-ta-maws-syen "Le Journal de Spirou". caliway pinaay tu a mihcaan zikuz tu tataytay a misanga" ci Mu-li- malingatu tu misulitay ci Le-nyeke-si-ni "Ren√© Goscinny" mapulung misanga' tu mahiniay a nisulitan, hinisa pikakaduman nu heni a misanga' tu "malemeday ci Lu-ke" kacakatan a ziday. pikakaduman nuheni misilit saayaway a musakau I 1955 a mihca 8 a bulad 25 a demiaday "S-pi-lu-ta-maw-syen tu saayaway. (Ren√© Goscinny) "šłä. Katukuh tu 1967 a mihcaan mahinizsy s mangga apacumuden nu heni i I-le-nye¬∑Ke-si-ni nu uzipay anipatahkal tu zasi a mangga "paculilay". 1977 a mihcaan, mapatay ci Le-nye¬∑Ke-si-ni zikuz, ci Mu-li-s mitanam mikilim tu zumaay a misulitay lalid a misanga'. Zuma pasu "Vicq,Bob de Groot,Jean L√©turgie atu Lo Hartog Van Banda. ŚąįšļÜ1967ŚĻī, Vicq,Bob de Groot,Jean L√©turgieŚíĆLo Hartog Van Banda. 1993 a mihcaan An-ke-la-mu kanatal mangga a kalimulakan "Angoul√™me International Comics Festival" saayaway, "malemeday ci Lu-ke" mahiniay a mangga mala u kazenengay a nipatahkalan tu nisulitan. 2001 a mihcaan, mapatay ci Mu-li-s. mikulitay nu Ba-kow ci Achd√© atu misulitay aci Laurent Gerra a makakadum, tuloin sa misabaluhay misanga' tu "malemeday ci Lu-ke" a man gga. 1993 (Angoul√™me International Comics Festival)šłä," Achd√©ŤąáÁ∑®ŚäáLaurent Gerra . katukuh 2009 a mihcaan, malemeday ci Lu-ke mahiniay a mangga mapabelin tu nu, kamu nu I-tali, kamu nu Ing, kamu nu Si-pang-ya, kamu nu Pu-taw-aya, kamu nu Te-kow, kamu nu He-lan, kamu nu Nan-bey, kamu nu Tu-al-ci, kamu nu nu-wi, kamu nu Luy-tyen, kamu nu Tan-may, kamu nu Say-al-wi-ya-Ke-low-ay-si-ya, kamu nu Si-la, kamu nu Ben-lan, kamu nu Cye-ke, kamu nu Tat-mi-al, kamu nu Sung-ya-li, kamu nu In-tu, kamu nu Ni-si-ya, kamu nu Pin-taw, kamu nu Ye-nan, atu kamu nu Layak. Pulung ku nipatahkalan a cudad katukuh tu 3 walwalen, u satalakaway anipatahkalan a cudad nu mangga u saka 6 ku ngangan. pulung nu nipasisilan a ngangan miazih tu nipabaluwan a mangga. Ťá≥2009ŚĻī, . kungku a kamu śÉÖÁĮÄś¶āŤ¶Ā uyni a mangga i Amelikaay a kawaw, kungkuay a tademaw ci Lu-ke, u milakalakay a tademaw. tibahaway a tademaw, tataytay sa tacuwacuwa mi lakalak, manamuh miedap tu tademaw, mipadang tu pakuyucay. u singanganay aca tu kalamkamay a mikuwang, kanahatu adingu nu uzip caay kadadawen ciniza!nika, micuay tu makatalay a tademaw, ci Lu-ke nacaay henay ku kuwa ku sapipatay tu tademaw "zuma tu ci Bey-li¬∑ti-bow" hina maazih ni Lu-ke ku mabelilihay aadaen ci Taw-al-tun "Dalton" sepat a calakakaan, Cyaw "Joe", William", Cye-ke "Jack" atu ci A-wi-li-al "Averell". Lu-keay a subayu kamu tu "u sadadawaay a subayu i kitakit"Co-li¬∑can-ba "Jolly Jumper", izaw henay ku cacay Te-kow pahutinay a wacu, kamu "u sabulilihay a wac u i kitakit" Wan-tan-lan "Rantanplan" ku pacabayay cinizaan. (Averell). "ťėģŚĚ¶Ťė≠(Rantanplan)ťô™šľīŤĎóšĽĖ. i saayaway nu paycacay aazihan a mangga nu sazikuzay, ci Lu-ke mikacaw tu subayu mikelid tu wacu' muculi i kaceleman nu cilal. mudadiw tu nu Ameylika a dacdiw, "u pakuyucay tataytayay nu milakalakay, miliyas tu luma' mabatad ku zazan atayni‚Ä¶" " malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
S.PHON: == kakir~…ĺiman == mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô ***** "mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô" "kamu nu ba, r~…ĺu ¶kj r~…ĺuk…ô" u ¶a ¶aj makajzaaj i pid-r~…ĺi-s a maŇčga saajawaj anisaŇča Ē~ °an ni *mu-r~…ĺi-s, aŇčaŇčan atu ba-kow sinmuŇča a maŇčga ¶i r~…ĺ…ô-nj…ô*k…ô-*u-ni pur~…ĺuŇč a nisaŇča Ē~ °an tu nu maŇčgaaj. u sasur~…ĺitan makajzaaj i satipan nu am…ôr~…ĺika u pańßutinaj ńßinadińßiaj mipadaŇčaj tu mapad…ôsaj a tad…ômaw. ujni a maŇčga u ¶a ¶ajaj i aw- ¶ow atu pj…ô-m…ô- ¶ow matin…ôŇč namin ku pajr~…ĺumar~…ĺuma Ē~ °an tu siŇčaŇčanaj a maŇčgaan, u mapar~…ĺawaj ku a ¶awa, katukuńß ajza ¶aaj kar~…ĺasawad ku ŇčaŇčan. tajwan kapur~…ĺuŇčan a tir~…ĺibi mi ¶akaj tu mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô a iga nu misauŇčajaj a maŇčga "buŇč- ¶…ô-si- ¶…ôn- ¶i Ē~ ° ku sitatuŇčusaj, tańßkar~…ĺ i tir~…ĺibi. tusa ku kamu. d*d u ńßuŇč-…ôn r~…ĺar~…ĺaŇčawan tajr~…ĺi patańßkar~…ĺaj, misur~…ĺup tu nu ńßur~…ĺamaj a kamu , ba a kamu atu ¶uŇč-iŇč ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a ¶udad. makaj **** a mińß ¶aan, pi-r~…ĺi-s nu misur~…ĺitaj tu maŇčga ¶i mu-r~…ĺi-s "morris" saajawaj a nisaŇča Ē~ °an nu mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô" mar~…ĺiŇčatu ku mańßiniaj a wawaj, katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan kapatajan a pańß…ôz…ôk, nisur~…ĺitan niza tu mańßiniaj na ¶aaj ńß…ônaj kak…ôtun. u saajawaj niza ku mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô ŇčanŇčan nu kuŇčńßku "**** a mińß ¶aan ja-r~…ĺi-san-na- ¶ow "arizona ****" i **** a mińß ¶a ** a bur~…ĺad * a d…ômiad, saajawaj pabinawr~…ĺan musakamu i bakow-pi-r~…ĺi-s maŇčga zasi "s-pi-r~…ĺu-ta-maws-sj…ôn "r~…ĺ…ô *ournar~…ĺ d…ô spirou". ¶ar~…ĺiwaj pinaaj tu a mińß ¶aan zikuz tu tatajtaj a misaŇča" ¶i mu-r~…ĺi- mar~…ĺiŇčatu tu misur~…ĺitaj ¶i r~…ĺ…ô-nj…ôk…ô-si-ni "*…ôn* gos ¶innj" mapur~…ĺuŇč misaŇča Ē~ ° tu mańßiniaj a nisur~…ĺitan, ńßinisa pikakaduman nu ńß…ôni a misaŇča Ē~ ° tu "mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô" ka ¶akatan a zidaj. pikakaduman nuńß…ôni misir~…ĺit saajawaj a musakau i **** a mińß ¶a * a bur~…ĺad ** a d…ômiadaj "s-pi-r~…ĺu-ta-maw-sj…ôn tu saajawaj. (*…ôn* gos ¶innj) "*. katukuńß tu **** a mińß ¶aan mańßinizsj s maŇčga apa ¶umud…ôn nu ńß…ôni i i-r~…ĺ…ô-nj…ô*k…ô-si-ni nu uzipaj anipatańßkar~…ĺ tu zasi a maŇčga "pa ¶ur~…ĺir~…ĺaj". **** a mińß ¶aan, mapataj ¶i r~…ĺ…ô-nj…ô*k…ô-si-ni zikuz, ¶i mu-r~…ĺi-s mitanam mikir~…ĺim tu zumaaj a misur~…ĺitaj r~…ĺar~…ĺid a misaŇča Ē~ °. zuma pasu "*i ¶*,bob d…ô groot,*…ôan r~…ĺ*turgi…ô atu r~…ĺo ńßartog *an banda. *******, *i ¶*,bob d…ô groot,*…ôan r~…ĺ*turgi…ô*r~…ĺo ńßartog *an banda. **** a mińß ¶aan an-k…ô-r~…ĺa-mu kanatar~…ĺ maŇčga a kar~…ĺimur~…ĺakan "aŇčour~…ĺ*m…ô int…ôrnationar~…ĺ ¶omi ¶s f…ôsti*ar~…ĺ" saajawaj, "mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô" mańßiniaj a maŇčga mar~…ĺa u kaz…ôn…ôŇčaj a nipatańßkar~…ĺan tu nisur~…ĺitan. **** a mińß ¶aan, mapataj ¶i mu-r~…ĺi-s. mikur~…ĺitaj nu ba-kow ¶i a ¶ńßd* atu misur~…ĺitaj a ¶i r~…ĺaur…ônt g…ôrra a makakadum, tur~…ĺoin sa misabar~…ĺuńßaj misaŇča Ē~ ° tu "mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô" a man gga. **** (aŇčour~…ĺ*m…ô int…ôrnationar~…ĺ ¶omi ¶s f…ôsti*ar~…ĺ)*," a ¶ńßd****r~…ĺaur…ônt g…ôrra . katukuńß **** a mińß ¶aan, mar~…ĺ…ôm…ôdaj ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô mańßiniaj a maŇčga mapab…ôr~…ĺin tu nu, kamu nu i-tar~…ĺi, kamu nu iŇč, kamu nu si-paŇč-ja, kamu nu pu-taw-aja, kamu nu t…ô-kow, kamu nu ńß…ô-r~…ĺan, kamu nu nan-b…ô, kamu nu tu-ar~…ĺ- ¶i, kamu nu nu-wi, kamu nu r~…ĺuj-tj…ôn, kamu nu tan-maj, kamu nu saj-ar~…ĺ-wi-ja-k…ô-r~…ĺow-aj-si-ja, kamu nu si-r~…ĺa, kamu nu b…ôn-r~…ĺan, kamu nu ¶j…ô-k…ô, kamu nu tat-mi-ar~…ĺ, kamu nu suŇč-ja-r~…ĺi, kamu nu in-tu, kamu nu ni-si-ja, kamu nu pin-taw, kamu nu j…ô-nan, atu kamu nu r~…ĺajak. pur~…ĺuŇč ku nipatańßkar~…ĺan a ¶udad katukuńß tu * war~…ĺwar~…ĺ…ôn, u satar~…ĺakawaj anipatańßkar~…ĺan a ¶udad nu maŇčga u saka * ku ŇčaŇčan. pur~…ĺuŇč nu nipasisir~…ĺan a ŇčaŇčan miazińß tu nipabar~…ĺuwan a maŇčga. ******, . kuŇčku a kamu **** ujni a maŇčga i am…ôr~…ĺikaaj a kawaw, kuŇčkuaj a tad…ômaw ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô, u mir~…ĺakar~…ĺakaj a tad…ômaw. tibańßawaj a tad…ômaw, tatajtaj sa ta ¶uwa ¶uwa mi r~…ĺakar~…ĺak, manamuńß mi…ôdap tu tad…ômaw, mipadaŇč tu pakuju ¶aj. u siŇčaŇčanaj a ¶a tu kar~…ĺamkamaj a mikuwaŇč, kanańßatu adiŇču nu uzip ¶aaj kadadaw…ôn ¶iniza!nika, mi ¶uaj tu makatar~…ĺaj a tad…ômaw, ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô na ¶aaj ńß…ônaj ku kuwa ku sapipataj tu tad…ômaw "zuma tu ¶i b…ô-r~…ĺi*ti-bow" ńßina maazińß ni r~…ĺu-k…ô ku mab…ôr~…ĺir~…ĺińßaj aada…ôn ¶i taw-ar~…ĺ-tun "dar~…ĺton" s…ôpat a ¶ar~…ĺakakaan, ¶jaw "*o…ô", wir~…ĺr~…ĺiam", ¶j…ô-k…ô "*a ¶k" atu ¶i a-wi-r~…ĺi-ar~…ĺ "a*…ôr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ". r~…ĺu-k…ôaj a subaju kamu tu "u sadadawaaj a subaju i kitakit" ¶o-r~…ĺi* ¶an-ba "*or~…ĺr~…ĺj *ump…ôr", izaw ńß…ônaj ku ¶a ¶aj t…ô-kow pańßutinaj a wa ¶u, kamu "u sabur~…ĺir~…ĺińßaj a wa ¶ u i kitakit" wan-tan-r~…ĺan "*antanpr~…ĺan" ku pa ¶abajaj ¶inizaan. (a*…ôr…ôr~…ĺr~…ĺ). "***(*antanpr~…ĺan)****. i saajawaj nu paj ¶a ¶aj aazińßan a maŇčga nu sazikuzaj, ¶i r~…ĺu-k…ô mika ¶aw tu subaju mik…ôr~…ĺid tu wa ¶u Ē~ ° mu ¶ur~…ĺi i ka ¶…ôr~…ĺ…ôman nu ¶ir~…ĺar~…ĺ. mudadiw tu nu am…ôr~…ĺika a da ¶diw, "u pakuju ¶aj tatajtajaj nu mir~…ĺakar~…ĺakaj, mir~…ĺijas tu r~…ĺuma Ē~ ° mabatad ku zazan atajni*" " mar~…ĺar~…ĺitin tu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj atu zumaaj a natin…ôŇčan
S.FORM: == kakiliman == malemeday ci Lu-ke ŚĻłťĀčÁöĄŤ∑ĮŚÖč "malemeday ci Lu-ke" "kamu nu Ba, Lucky Luke" u cacay makayzaay i Pid-li-s a mangga saayaway anisanga'an ni qMu-li-s, angangan atu Ba-kow sinmunga a mangga ci Le-nye¬∑Ke-vu-ni pulung a nisanga'an tu nu manggaay. u sasulitan makayzaay i satipan nu Ameylika u pahutinay hinadihiay mipadangay tu mapadesay a tademaw. Uyni a mangga u cacayay i Aw-cow atu Pye-mey-cow matineng namin ku paylumaluma'an tu singanganay a manggaan, u mapalaway ku acawa, katukuh ayza caay kalasawad ku ngangan. Taywan kapulungan a tilibi micakay tu malemeday ci Lu-ke a iga nu misaungayay a mangga "bung-ce-si-cen-ci' ku sitatungusay, tahkal i tilibi. tusa ku kamu. DVD u Hung-en lalangawan tayli patahkalay, misulup tu nu hulamay a kamu , Ba a kamu atu cung-ing hekalay a cudad. makay 1946 a mihcaan, Pi-li-s nu misulitay tu mangga ci Mu-li-s "Morris" saayaway a nisanga'an nu malemeday ci Lu-ke" malingatu ku mahiniay a waway, katukuh 2001 a mihcaan kapatayan a pahezek, nisulitan niza tu mahiniay nacaay henay kaketun. u saayaway niza ku malemeday ci Lu-ke nganngan nu kunghku "1880 a mihcaan Ya-li-san-na-cow "Arizona 1880" i 1946 a mihca 12 a bulad 7 a demiad, saayaway pabinawlan musakamu i Bakow-Pi-li-s mangga zasi "S-pi-lu-ta-maws-syen "Le Journal de Spirou". caliway pinaay tu a mihcaan zikuz tu tataytay a misanga" ci Mu-li- malingatu tu misulitay ci Le-nyeke-si-ni "Ren√© Goscinny" mapulung misanga' tu mahiniay a nisulitan, hinisa pikakaduman nu heni a misanga' tu "malemeday ci Lu-ke" kacakatan a ziday. pikakaduman nuheni misilit saayaway a musakau I 1955 a mihca 8 a bulad 25 a demiaday "S-pi-lu-ta-maw-syen tu saayaway. (Ren√© Goscinny) "šłä. Katukuh tu 1967 a mihcaan mahinizsy s mangga apacumuden nu heni i I-le-nye¬∑Ke-si-ni nu uzipay anipatahkal tu zasi a mangga "paculilay". 1977 a mihcaan, mapatay ci Le-nye¬∑Ke-si-ni zikuz, ci Mu-li-s mitanam mikilim tu zumaay a misulitay lalid a misanga'. Zuma pasu "Vicq,Bob de Groot,Jean L√©turgie atu Lo Hartog Van Banda. ŚąįšļÜ1967ŚĻī, Vicq,Bob de Groot,Jean L√©turgieŚíĆLo Hartog Van Banda. 1993 a mihcaan An-ke-la-mu kanatal mangga a kalimulakan "Angoul√™me International Comics Festival" saayaway, "malemeday ci Lu-ke" mahiniay a mangga mala u kazenengay a nipatahkalan tu nisulitan. 2001 a mihcaan, mapatay ci Mu-li-s. mikulitay nu Ba-kow ci Achd√© atu misulitay aci Laurent Gerra a makakadum, tuloin sa misabaluhay misanga' tu "malemeday ci Lu-ke" a man gga. 1993 (Angoul√™me International Comics Festival)šłä," Achd√©ŤąáÁ∑®ŚäáLaurent Gerra . katukuh 2009 a mihcaan, malemeday ci Lu-ke mahiniay a mangga mapabelin tu nu, kamu nu I-tali, kamu nu Ing, kamu nu Si-pang-ya, kamu nu Pu-taw-aya, kamu nu Te-kow, kamu nu He-lan, kamu nu Nan-bey, kamu nu Tu-al-ci, kamu nu nu-wi, kamu nu Luy-tyen, kamu nu Tan-may, kamu nu Say-al-wi-ya-Ke-low-ay-si-ya, kamu nu Si-la, kamu nu Ben-lan, kamu nu Cye-ke, kamu nu Tat-mi-al, kamu nu Sung-ya-li, kamu nu In-tu, kamu nu Ni-si-ya, kamu nu Pin-taw, kamu nu Ye-nan, atu kamu nu Layak. Pulung ku nipatahkalan a cudad katukuh tu 3 walwalen, u satalakaway anipatahkalan a cudad nu mangga u saka 6 ku ngangan. pulung nu nipasisilan a ngangan miazih tu nipabaluwan a mangga. Ťá≥2009ŚĻī, . kungku a kamu śÉÖÁĮÄś¶āŤ¶Ā uyni a mangga i Amelikaay a kawaw, kungkuay a tademaw ci Lu-ke, u milakalakay a tademaw. tibahaway a tademaw, tataytay sa tacuwacuwa mi lakalak, manamuh miedap tu tademaw, mipadang tu pakuyucay. u singanganay aca tu kalamkamay a mikuwang, kanahatu adingu nu uzip caay kadadawen ciniza!nika, micuay tu makatalay a tademaw, ci Lu-ke nacaay henay ku kuwa ku sapipatay tu tademaw "zuma tu ci Bey-li¬∑ti-bow" hina maazih ni Lu-ke ku mabelilihay aadaen ci Taw-al-tun "Dalton" sepat a calakakaan, Cyaw "Joe", William", Cye-ke "Jack" atu ci A-wi-li-al "Averell". Lu-keay a subayu kamu tu "u sadadawaay a subayu i kitakit"Co-li¬∑can-ba "Jolly Jumper", izaw henay ku cacay Te-kow pahutinay a wacu, kamu "u sabulilihay a wac u i kitakit" Wan-tan-lan "Rantanplan" ku pacabayay cinizaan. (Averell). "ťėģŚĚ¶Ťė≠(Rantanplan)ťô™šľīŤĎóšĽĖ. i saayaway nu paycacay aazihan a mangga nu sazikuzay, ci Lu-ke mikacaw tu subayu mikelid tu wacu' muculi i kaceleman nu cilal. mudadiw tu nu Ameylika a dacdiw, "u pakuyucay tataytayay nu milakalakay, miliyas tu luma' mabatad ku zazan atayni‚Ä¶" " malalitin tu i hekalay atu zumaay a natinengan
